text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan gets injured during training, so I rush
her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer... I think I went at it a little too
hard today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hah... To think I can't even take care of my own
body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If McQueen ever found out, she'd be so upset
with me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rare to see her so timid, so I struggle to find
the right words to say.
choice_data_list: Let's take our time and fully recover.
Pain is all in the mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Take it easy, huh... I guess I should...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I need to stop being a crybaby about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan uses both hands to slap her cheeks and
psych herself up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, time to change gears!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Actually... some running practice would really hit
the spot right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait, running's out of the question right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've gotta be... patient...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to get back to training at full speed,
Ryan takes the day off to rest her body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: S-sorry, you're right. My thoughts are all jumbled.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, pain's all in the mind... All in the mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As someone who's always bursting with energy,
it'd be wrong for me to show weakness, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because I rushed her return, her
condition the next day doesn't improve at all.
Recovering is going to take even longer now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Rushing's no good, so maybe I should do
something to change my mood...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, that reminds me, isn't the latest volume out today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's nothing! Haha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Oh yeah, the last volume ended with a big love
reveal! I wonder what happens next!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (I'll read some manga tonight to cheer myself up!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan is somehow her usual energetic self again
the next day and is able to resume training.
